name: 40m_inverted_v_90ft_feedlines_preliminary
description: Preliminary tool-learning case from 4NEC2. May be replaced after NEC feedline/transposition redo.
notes: This is a preliminary case based on the 90 ft equal feedline model.
NEC model may need to be redone due to possible feedline transposition issue.
Do not treat this as the final design case.
